taco-bowls.name: Taco Bowls

ingredients.prep:
sliced avocado, tortilla chips, shredded lettuce,
and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Toss 1 large tomato, chopped, ¼ medium red onion, finely chopped, ½ jalapeño, finely chopped, ¼ cup finely chopped cilantro, and 3 Tbsp. fresh lime juice in a small bowl to combine; season with kosher salt. Set salsa aside.
Pulse ½ jalapeño, coarsely chopped, 1 small yellow onion, coarsely chopped, and 6 garlic cloves, coarsely chopped, in a food processor until finely chopped.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium skillet over medium-high. Cook 1 lb. ground beef (20% fat), stirring and breaking up with a wooden spoon, until browned and cooked through, 6–8 minutes. Add onion mixture and one 1-oz. packet taco seasoning mix; cook, stirring often, until beginning to stick to pan, 6–8 minutes. Pour in ½ cup water, scraping up any browned bits stuck to bottom of pan. Cook, stirring often, until sauce is slightly thickened, about 2 minutes.
Divide spiced beef and cooked rice among bowls. Serve with sliced avocado, tortilla chips, shredded lettuce, lime wedges, and reserved salsa.

tagliatelle-with-anchovies-lezzet.name: Tagliatelle With Anchovies
instructions: 1. Clean and wash the dough thoroughly and drain the water by taking the filter.
2. Carrot and roughness.
3. Cook the pasta in a large pot to pay attention to the cooking proposal on the package.
4. melt butter in the pan and roast the dough.
5. Heat the olive oil in another pan.
6. Paste Carrot and pumpkins.
7. Add and mix the dough into the vegetable pan and get from the stove.
8. Mix pasta with drain and doughy mixture.
9. Decorate with black pepper and salt serpip mint leaf according to request.
10. Serve.

tangy-meatloaf-sauce.name: Tangy Meatloaf Sauce
instructions: Stir ketchup, chili sauce, brown sugar, lemon juice, mustard, and Worcestershire sauce together in a bowl with a whisk until the sugar dissolves.

tangy-rhubarb-salsa.name: Tangy Rhubarb Salsa

ingredients.prep: seeded and coarsely chopped - or to taste

instructions: Stir rhubarb into a large pot of boiling water and cook for 10 seconds. Quickly drain rhubarb and rinse with cold water until cool; transfer rhubarb to a large bowl.

Place red onion, green, red, and yellow bell peppers, jalapeño pepper, and cilantro into a food processor and pulse 3 or 4 times to finely chop; transfer pepper mixture to bowl with rhubarb. Stir in tomatoes.

Dissolve brown sugar in Key lime juice in a bowl; lightly stir lime juice mixture into rhubarb mixture. Sprinkle salsa with salt, garlic powder, and black pepper and stir salsa again. Refrigerate at least 3 hours to blend flavors.

instructions: 1. Tarator for the all necessary materials in a large bowl of all thoroughly material pay st until you cook.

tasty-101-beef-wellington.name: Tasty 101: Beef Wellington

ingredients.prep: such as baby bella, shiitake, and trumpet

instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150°C).

Add the mushrooms to the bowl of a food processor and pulse until finely diced, but not blended into a paste. Spread the mushrooms on a baking sheet in an even layer and transfer to the oven. Cook, stirring every 15 minutes, until the mushrooms have released their moisture and are dried out, about 45 minutes total.

Meanwhile, truss the tenderloin: Measure a piece of butcher’s twine 6 times the length of the tenderloin. Wrap the twine around one end of the loin and tie a knot to secure the string. Make a loop around your hand with the string and place over the loin about 1 inch down from the first knot. Continue looping the twine in 1-inch intervals until you reach the end, then tie the twine in a knot to secure (this helps the tenderloin hold its shape). Generously season the beef tenderloin with salt and black pepper.

Heat the vegetable oil in a large cast iron skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering. Place the seasoned tenderloin in the pan and sear quickly on all sides to lock in moisture, about 1 minute per side. Do not overcook; it’s fine if the meat does not have a golden brown crust.

Remove the pan from the heat and transfer the seared tenderloin to a small plate or baking sheet. Cut off the twine, then brush the tenderloin with the mustard to cover completely. Transfer to the refrigerator to cool, about 1 hour.

Return the pan to medium-low heat. Add the butter, shallots, and garlic and cook until the shallots have caramelized, about 5 minutes, stirring with a wooden spoon or heat-safe spatula to prevent from burning.

Deglaze the pan with the cognac, stirring to scrape up any browned bits from the bottom. Continue cooking until the alcohol has evaporated and the pan is mostly dry, about 1 minute. Add the dehydrated mushrooms and stir to incorporate. Season with salt to taste. Transfer the duxelles to a bowl and cover with plastic wrap, pressing directly against the surface. Transfer to the refrigerator to cool completely, about 45 minutes.

On a large sheet of plastic wrap, arrange the prosciutto in a large rectangle wide enough to cover the tenderloin, layering evenly. Spread the mushroom mixture evenly across the prosciutto, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges, and press down in a flat layer.

Place the tenderloin at the bottom of the mushroom mixture and use the plastic wrap to help roll the prosciutto and mushrooms around the tenderloin. The prosciutto should tightly and completely cover the tenderloin. Hold the ends of the plastic wrap and roll the log to help create a tight seal. Refrigerate the roll until chilled all the way through, about 1 hour.
Place a sheet of puff pastry on a lightly floured surface and roll out with a lightly floured rolling pin until the pastry sheet is large enough to cover the log.

Brush the top third of the puff pastry with beaten egg. Unwrap the log and place on the bottom third of the pastry, then roll up into a tight log, turning so the seal is at the bottom. Fold in the sides of the pastry and press under the log. Set the log on a large sheet of plastic wrap and roll to wrap tightly. Refrigerate again while the oven preheats.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Unwrap the log and set on the prepared baking sheet. Brush the log all over with beaten egg, then use a paring knife to create a decorative pattern on the puff pastry. Alternatively, cut the second sheet of puff pastry into long strips and create a lattice over the Wellington, and/or cut out autumnal shapes and press them onto the log. Brush the log with more beaten egg.

Bake the Wellington until the puff pastry is a deep golden brown, 30–40 minutes. If the pastry is getting too dark before the beef is finished cooking, cover loosely with foil and continue cooking. The internal temperature of the beef should reach 52°C (52°C) for a medium-rare finish.
Remove the Wellington from the oven and let rest for 1 hour. The internal temperature will continue to rise to 57°C (57°C).
Slice the beef Wellington into 1-inch pieces and serve.
Enjoy!

tempeh-bacon.name: Tempeh Bacon
instructions: On a cutting board, cut tempeh ¼-inch (6 mm) thick slices.
Add olive oil to a pan over medium heat and add the tempeh. Cook for 5 minutes on each side until brown and crispy.
Add 1 tablespoon of water to the pan and stir.
Add soy sauce, maple syrup, liquid smoke, garlic powder, and black pepper, and stir until tempeh is evenly coated.
Let brown for 2-3 minutes.
Enjoy!

thai-roast-chicken-thighs-with-coconut-r.name: Thai Roast Chicken Thighs With Coconut Rice

ingredients.prep: peeled, finely grated, plus 3 peeled slices

ingredients.item: Coconut palm sugar or (packed) light brown sugar
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Cilantro leaves with tender stems and lime wedges

instructions: Whisk lime zest and juice, grated ginger, garlic, coconut palm sugar, fish sauce, ½ cup coconut milk, 2 Tbsp. oil, 2 tsp. pepper in a large bowl to combine. Set ¼ cup marinade aside for serving. Place chicken in remaining marinade and toss to coat. Cover and chill at least 1 hour and up to 12 hours.

Preheat oven to 400°. Generously brush cabbage wedges on both sides with oil; season with salt and pepper. Arrange, a cut side down, in a medium cast-iron skillet. Remove chicken from marinade and set, skin side up, on top of cabbage; season with salt and pepper. Roast 35 minutes. Increase oven temperature to 450° and continue to roast, rotating pan halfway through, until chicken thighs are browned and crispy, 5–7 minutes more.

Meanwhile, bring rice, ginger slices, remaining 1 cup coconut milk, remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 cup water to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until liquid is absorbed, 15–20 minutes. Remove pan from heat. Fish out and discard ginger slices. Re-cover pan and let rice sit until ready to serve.
Arrange chicken on a platter; drizzle with reserved marinade and top with cilantro leaves. Serve with coconut rice and lime wedges for squeezing over.

the-right-bank.name: The Right Bank

ingredients.prep: hulled, plus 2 strawberries, halved, for garnish

instructions: Prepare grill for high heat. Grill tangerine slices until lightly charred, about 30 seconds per side. Let cool; set aside 4 slices for serving.

Muddle remaining tangerine slices, pepper, and 2 cups strawberries in a large pitcher. Add tequilla, jam, and Scotch and fill pitcher with ice. Stir until outside of pitcher is frosty, about 1 minute. Divide among 4 rocks glasses filled with ice and top off with club soda . Garnish each with a strawberry half and a reserved tangerine slice.

three-bean-salad.name: Three-bean Salad

ingredients.prep: trimmed, cut into 1-inch pieces (2 1/2 cups cut)

ingredients.item: Grated lemon zest plus 2 tablespoons fresh juice

ingredients.prep: plus more for cooking water; for table salt, use half as much by volume
finely chopped (about 1/2 cup)2 small celery stalks (2 ounces; 57 g), thinly sliced on an angle (about 1/2 cup)
thinly sliced on an angle (about 1/2 cup)

instructions: Fill a large bowl with ice water; set aside. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add green beans to boiling water and cook until bright green and crisp-tender, 1 to 2 minutes. Use a slotted spoon or spider skimmer to transfer vegetables to prepared ice-bath. Let sit until cooled, about 5 minutes. Drain beans well; pat dry with paper towels.

In a large bowl, whisk together vinegar, lemon zest and juice, garlic, mustard, honey, salt, and pepper until well combined. Slowly drizzle in oil, while whisking, until emulsified. Stir in black eyed peas, green beans, kidney beans, onion, celery, and parsley until well combined. Cover and chill until flavors meld, about 30 minutes. Serve.

tikka-chicken-jalapeno-poppers.name: Tikka Chicken Jalapeno Poppers
instructions: Combine yogurt, garam masala, chicken masala, coriander, ginger-garlic paste, chili powder, turmeric, and salt in a bowl. Set aside.

Slice chicken breasts into small strips that will fit on halved jalapenos and place into the bowl with the tikka marinade. Mix well, cover, and let sit in the refrigerator at least 30 minutes; the longer your marinade, the more of a flavor profile on the chicken.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Place a cooling rack on top of a baking tray.

Snap off jalapeno stems by holding a pepper with one hand and pulling it off to the side. Repeat with remaining peppers. Slice all jalapenos in half lengthwise and remove all seeds and ribbing using a teaspoon, making sure not to remove white stem area.

Fill jalapeno halves with cream cheese using a teaspoon; place as much cheese as to your liking. Place a strip of tikka chicken on top of cream cheese and wrap each chicken popper halve with a slice of bacon. Place on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until bacon is browned and crisp, about 40 minutes.

tiktoks-air-fryer-shrimp.name: Tiktok's Air Fryer Shrimp
instructions: Preheat air fryer to 191°C.

Pat shrimp with clean paper towels to dry then toss with olive oil and paprika in a medium bowl. Lightly brush the air fryer basket with oil. Add half of the shrimp, spreading them out in an even layer and cook 7 minutes. Repeat with the remaining half.
Combine the butter and seasoning in a large bowl. Add shrimp and toss to coat.

tiramisu-cake-with-almond-crocans-argiro.name: Tiramisu Cake With Almond Crocans

ingredients.item: 3/4 cup of flour inflated by itself
1 cup of sweet samou wine or lemon
750 grity mascarpone or other fresh cream cheese at room temperature
3/4 cup of flour inflated by itself
1 cup of sweet samou wine or lemon
750 grity mascarpone or other fresh cream cheese at room temperature

instructions: We start by beating eggs in the mixer for 8 to 10 minutes until white.
Then pour a spoonful of sugar and continue until they become cream.
Shake the three types of flour on parchment paper and add them to the beaten eggs, always beating at low speed.
Preheat the oven. We'll fry in the air at 160.
Butter and spread parchment paper in two round forms 20 or 22 cm (we can also use disposable).
Divide the mixture into two forms and bake for about 25 minutes, until it is detached from the walls and slightly browned.
Let the cake cool.

tom-collins-bar.name: Tom Collins Bar
instructions: Combine gin, lemon juice, and sugar in a pitcher or large measuring glass and stir to dissolve sugar; refrigerate gin mixture if not making drinks right away.
Do Ahead: Gin mixture can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

When ready to serve, arrange lemon wedges, mango, cucumber, mint sprigs, ginger, raspberries, and strawberries on a platter or in separate bowls and set out alongside gin mixture, club soda, and a bucket of ice.
For each cocktail, muddle ingredients of your choice (mix and match!) in a Collins glass. Fill with ice, then add ¼ cup gin mixture and top off with club soda.

tomato-and-butter-tartine.name: Tomato And Butter Tartine
instructions: Smear bread with butter and top with sliced tomato. Season with salt and pepper.

tomato-ricotta-tartine.name: Tomato Ricotta Tartine
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine tomatoes, basil, McCormick Paprika, salt, and pepper.
Spread ricotta on bread.
Top with tomato salad.
Drizzle with olive oil.
Enjoy!

tomato-soup-with-arugula-croutons-and-pe.name: Tomato Soup With Arugula, Croutons, And Pecorino
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Toss bread with 2 Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt. Bake, tossing halfway through, until golden brown and crunchy, 8–10 minutes; set croutons aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium. Add onion, garlic, and thyme; season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring often, until onion is soft, 5–7 minutes. Add tomatoes and cook, stirring often, until they just start to release their juices, about 1 minute. Add 1 cup water and bring to a boil. Transfer tomato mixture to a blender and blend until smooth; taste and add hot sauce to your liking. Season with salt and pepper.
Drizzle soup with more oil and top with arugula, Pecorino, and croutons.
Do Ahead: Croutons can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

tomato-tart-with-eggplant-base-lezzet.name: Tomato Tart With Eggplant Base
instructions: 1. Peel eggplants.
2. Cut slices of a finger thickness.
3. Wait for 30 minutes in salted water.
4. Cut tomatoes in a finger thickness.
5. Take olive oil into the blender container.
6. Add three teeth winding, salt, pepper and cake, and pull well.
7. Directory eggplants and tomato slices to oil paper-line tray.
8. Remove garlic olive oil.
9. Cook for 10 minutes in the oven, which is pre-heated to 180 degrees.
10. Place the tomato slice on each eggplant slice after the vegetable is cooked.
11. 11. Remove the olive crush on it.
12.  Galeta unu serpin.
12. August Finally, after sharing the fine sliced goat cheese, cook until the pre-heated 180 degree in the oven fry.
14 July Serve hot.

tori-karaage.name: Tori Karaage

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced (white and green parts separated)
(such as canola, avocado, or vegetable oil), as needed for frying

instructions: Cut the chicken into large (1½–2-inch) pieces, first by cutting lengthwise, then into 4 or 6 pieces (depending on how large each chicken thigh is). Place in a bowl, and season with a heavy pinch of kosher salt.
To the bowl, add the soy sauce, mirin, grated ginger, sliced scallion whites, and grated garlic. Stir to thoroughly combine. Cover and marinate in the fridge for 30 minutes–1 hour.
When ready to cook, add oil to a wide pot or skillet to a depth of 2 inches. Heat the oil over medium heat until a thermometer in the oil registers 163°C (165°C).

In a large bowl or on a baking sheet, stir together the flour and potato starch with a heavy pinch of salt. Working with 1 piece at a time, coat the marinated chicken pieces in the flour mixture, shaking off any excess coating.

Carefully add a few pieces of chicken at a time to the hot oil, being careful not to overcrowd the pan. (Adding too much chicken at once will lower the oil’s temperature, increasing the cook time and resulting in greasy chicken.)

Cook each batch for 3–4 minutes, until the chicken turns a pale brown. Remove the chicken, and place it on a wire rack or a paper towel-lined plate. Continue to cook the remaining chicken. Try to maintain a steady oil temperature of 163°C (165°C).
Once all the chicken is cooked, raise the oil temperature to 177°C (175°C) over medium heat.

Return the chicken in batches to the hot oil, and fry for about 90 seconds per batch, or until it turns golden brown and the internal temperature of each chicken piece reaches 74°C (74°C). Remove the chicken, and place it on a clean wire rack or a paper towel-lined plate. Continue with the rest of the chicken.
Let the chicken cool for 5 minutes. Sprinkle with the scallion greens, and serve.
Enjoy!

tray-breadsticks-lezzet.name: Tray Breadsticks

ingredients.item: 100 g butter ( softened in the heat of the room)

instructions: 1. Transfer flour to mixing container.
2. Add instant dough yeast and other materials.
3. Smooth and medium hardness knead until you get a dough.
4. Take the dough into two, cover it above and leave for 30 minutes at room temperature for yeast.
5. After kneading yeast dough individually 1-2 minutes more, open 1 cm thick with the help of roller on the flour sprinkled counter.
6. Remove the egg yolk on the dough, leave for 15 minutes for a tray index and second time in room heat.
7. Open each of the yeast dough with a thickness of 1 cm on the sprinkled counter.
8. Transfer the dough on oil paper.
9. Remove egg yolk on the dough, sprinkle the chopped fresh pepper, sesame and weed.
10. Prepare the remaining dough in the same way.
11. 11. Bake the dough that you listen to in the oven, which is already heated to 220 degrees, for 20 minutes.

tripe-stew-teleculinaria.name: Tripe Stew

ingredients.item: 200 g baked butter beans (or other to taste)

instructions: Bring to the fire a large pan with abundant water. When boiling, add the bud and the other meats indicated, including sausages. Take it out as you cook. Book all the meats in a hot place as well as 200 ml of the water, and keep the remaining meat on fire.
Add the cabbages, cut into pieces, the potatoes, peeled and cut in half, and the carrots and turnip, peeled and cut into rooms, placing them in the pan in this order.
Cook the rice in a separate pot using the 200 ml of water you have reserved and adding 100 ml of water. In another pot with boiling water, heat the beans.

When the potatoes are cooked, remove the vegetables for a serving dish. Cut the meats and sausages, as you see in the picture, and put them on the tray as well. Drain the beans and put it also on the tray. Serve the stew with the rice.

tuna-casserole-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Casserole
instructions: Wash the potatoes, cut them in half, cook them in salt-tempered water, then drain them, remove their skin and pass them through the bird pass. Add the milk and yolks, season with nutmeg and pepper, rectify the salt and reserve.

Refogue a cebola e os dentes de alho, finamente picados, num tacho com o azeite, mexendo de vez em quando. Junte o tomate, tempere com um pouco de sal e pimenta, deixe cozinhar mais um pouco e depois envolva o atum escorrido. Envolva e deixe apurar.

Have half the mashed potatoes in an oven container, cover it with the previous preparation and then with the remaining puree. Brush with crushed yolk and take it to the oven, preheated at 200°C, until the surface is toasty.

tuna-pate-with-delicacies-from-the-sea-t.name: Tuna Pate With Delicacies From The Sea
tuna-pate-with-delicacies-from-the-sea-t.original_name: Patê de atum com delícias do mar
instructions: Open the tuna cans and drain it well. Cut off the delights of the sea, previously thawed, and put them in a glass, along with the tuna.
Add the remaining ingredients and crush everything with the magic wand. Take the pâté to the cold until serving with toast.

tuna-salad-with-cream-cheese-argiro.name: Tuna Salad With Cream Cheese

ingredients.item: 200 grarla fresh cream cheese at room temperature
200 grarla fresh cream cheese at room temperature

instructions: Let the fresh cream cheese come to room temperature.
Drain the tuna from the liquids and with a fork break it into fibers
Add the chopped vegetables, celery, onion, fresh onion and carrot.
Add the chopped parsley and dill.
Add the fresh cream cheese with its liquids.
Add the pepper and lemon juice. Add the olive oil.
Mix the tuna salad to homogenize.
Cut thin slices of black bread.
We make bread sandwiches and add tuna salad.
Alternatively serve the ton salad in lettuce hearts or add it to warm pasta and mix to melt the cream cheese.

turnip-basti-lezzet.name: Turnip Basti
instructions: 1. Peel the peel of shawls and chop it in the form of large pieces.
2. Cut the meat in the same way and take it in the pot.
3. Add the butter and roast it in the middle fire until it leaves its own water.
4. Add chopped onions in the ring and continue cooking.
5. Add the shamp you're going to the shape of the parts.
6. Cook in jealous fire for 15 minutes.
7. Add water, salt and pepper and continue cooking the cover of the pot in a closed way.
8. Take the pot from the stove when shawl and meat softened.
9. Visit the lemon juice on the meal and serve.
